zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Hoo於大約1238年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，他的父親Sir Knight Alexander Hoo 4th Crusade Knight73歲，母親Dernell "Devorgulla" Canmore, Princess of Scotland and Dunkeld24歲。他於1273年與Beatrice DeAndeville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年5月9日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾盧頓 胡享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾盧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hoo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Wai Lam, Wing, Beng, Chin, Gan, Hing, Hui, Kee, Lai, Lai Ching, Mei-Mei.
variant Romanization of the surname   Hu  .

variants.name: Hu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Ming, Ping, Bin, Yi, Ying, Jing, Xiao, Qi, Yan, Chi.  Korean Chang, Chung, Min, Yiping, Chong, Chul, Hu, Jung Soo, Sang Hoon, Tian, Wook, Yiming.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 胡, a term referring to the ethnic minorities in ancient northern and western China: (i) from Hu (胡), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Henan province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771 BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Zheng (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) in the 26th year of the reign of King Ping of Zhou (died 720 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (ii) from Hu (胡), the name of a state (located in present-day Anhui province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu in the 15th year of the reign of Duke Ding of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 509–495 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (iii) from the personal name of Hu Gong Man (胡公满, Duke Hu of Chen), the posthumous title of Yu Man. He was given the fief of Chen (located mainly in present-day Henan and Anhui province) by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (iv) from the personal name of Hu Guang (胡廣), who changed his original surname 黃 to 胡 during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ). (v) from the Hu Gu (胡骨) or He Gu (纥骨) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their surname to 胡 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 扈, meaning ‘retinue’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Hu (扈), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) dating back to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ) (ii) adopted as a surname by the Hu Di Gan (扈地干) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Hoo was born about 1238, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knight Alexander Hoo 4th Crusade Knight, was 73 and his mother, Dernell "Devorgulla" Canmore, Princess of Scotland and Dunkeld, was 24. He married Beatrice DeAndeville in 1273. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 May 1310, in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Hoo est né environ 1238, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Alexander Hoo 4th Crusade Knight, avait 73 ans et sa mère, Dernell "Devorgulla" Canmore, Princess of Scotland and Dunkeld, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice DeAndeville en 1273. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1310, à Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Luton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1273 Beatrice DeAndeville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Mai 1310 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Luton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Hooが約1238年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Alexander Hoo 4th Crusade Knightは73歳，母Dernell "Devorgulla" Canmore, Princess of Scotland and Dunkeldは24歳であった。1273年にBeatrice DeAndevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年5月9日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトン ホーオで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Hoo(이)가 대략 1238년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight Alexander Hoo 4th Crusade Knight(은)는 73세였고, 그의 어머니 Dernell "Devorgulla" Canmore, Princess of Scotland and Dunkeld(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1273년 Beatrice DeAndeville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 루턴 후에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 루턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Hoo родился около 1238 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knight Alexander Hoo 4th Crusade Knight было 73 года, а матери, которую звали Dernell "Devorgulla" Canmore, Princess of Scotland and Dunkeld, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice DeAndeville в 1273 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 мая 1310 г. в местности лутон ху, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности лутон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
